rationale: The candidate d104ed6d366c1f4f5cc76262d4c4fb0fafb927fc is the only one that correctly translates the 'title' field in the frontmatter, which was empty in the 'current' version and the other candidate. It also provides a more natural and technically sound translation of terms like 'hot request path' (горячем пути запроса) and 'backtracking' (откат). It maintains all MDX structures and heading counts perfectly.
